name: huashu-data-pro
description: Local-first data analysis expert team for One Person Companies. Three subagents (trend / structure / anomaly) analyze your spreadsheet in parallel and deliver three-format reports (HTML / XLSX / PPTX) without any cloud upload.

displayDescription.zh: 「一人公司」本地数据分析专家团。一份 Excel 进，趋势 / 结构 / 异常三专家并行分析，交付网页、Excel、PPT 三格式报告，数据不出本地。
displayDescription.en: Local data analysis team for One Person Companies. Three experts (Trend / Structure / Anomaly) analyze in parallel and deliver HTML / XLSX / PPTX reports without any cloud upload.

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 分析这份财务表，三种格式的报告都要：finance.xlsx
defaultInitPrompt.en: Analyze finance.xlsx and deliver reports in all three formats.

quickPrompts.zh: 分析这份财务表，三种格式的报告都要：finance.xlsx
quickPrompts.en: Analyze finance.xlsx and deliver reports in all three formats.

quickPrompts.zh: 看一下这份订单数据的结构和异常：orders.xlsx
quickPrompts.en: Examine orders.xlsx for structural patterns and anomalies.

quickPrompts.zh: 我想看薪资数据近半年的趋势走向：payroll.xlsx
quickPrompts.en: Show me the half-year trend in payroll.xlsx.

profession.zh: 离群点扫描与风险标记
